forumEn: Supreme Court of the United Kingdom
issuesEn: distinction between shareholder and company assets
holdingZh: Prest 通过区分“隐匿原则”和“规避原则”重新收束英国揭开公司面纱 doctrine，强调真正刺破公司面纱的情形极为例外，不能以一般公平考虑取代公司独立人格规则。
holdingEn: Prest narrowed U.K. veil-piercing doctrine by distinguishing concealment from evasion, emphasizing that true veil piercing is exceptional and cannot displace ordinary rules of separate corporate personality on general fairness grounds.

sources.label: Research platform
sources.noteZh: BAILII OpenLaw 公司法清单收录该案为公司人格核心判例。
sources.noteEn: BAILII OpenLaw lists this as a core corporate-personality case.
